new_value: {"notes":"Changed uint32_t stats counters to uint64_t (prevents wrap on long-running nodes). Edited lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/include/lichen/meshcore/adapter.h. Commit: 15ef829ef"}
Changed all counters in lichen_meshcore_adapter_stats from uint32_t to uint64_t to prevent wraparound without detection. Verified with meshcore_adapter test assertions. Commit 15ef829ef
